LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE ANY KNOWLEDGE OF THE JUDGMENT IN NEVADA AND HE JUST RECENTLY HIRED AN ATTORNEY IN NEVADA. PLAINTIFF ROBERT TAYLOR'S MOTION FOR EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER ON SPOUSE'S COMMUNITY PROPERTY WAGES IS CONTINUED FROM JUNE 21, 2016 TO JULY 21, 2016 TO SEE WHETHER SOMETHING CAN BE DONE IN THE INTERIM AND IF THE SITUATION IS STILL THE SAME THE COURT WILL ISSUE A TENTATIVE RULING GRANTING THE MOTION SUBJECT TO ARGUMENT TO THE CONTRARY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 =302/HK

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ROBERT TAYLOR'S MOTION FOR EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER ON SPOUSE'S COMMUNITY PROPERTY WAGES IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332, BUS. TEL: 415-551-3745. (D302)

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL S. MARTIN OF THE MYERS, WIDDERS, GIBSON & JONES, TEL. NO. 1-805-644-7188 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT DOES NOT HAVE ANY KNOWLEDGE OF THE JUDGMENT IN NEVADA AND HE JUST RECENTLY HIRED AN ATTORNEY IN NEVADA. PLAINTIFF ROBERT TAYLOR'S Motion For Earnings Withholding Order on Spouse's Community Property Wages is continued to July 21, 2016 to see whether something can be done in the interim and if the situation is still the same the court will issue a tentative ruling granting the motion subject to argument to the contrary. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
